message:
refactor(tutorial): premium polish with OKLCH colors and Lucide icons

Apply Stripe-level premium polish to tutorial components:

- Replace all inline SVG icons with Lucide icon library
- Add animate-glow-pulse to active step indicators (ACFS pattern)
- Add "Swipe to navigate" hint to mobile progress stepper
- Add scroll fade indicators to code blocks
- Upgrade code block styling with OKLCH dark background
- Fix recommended badge clipping with new inline badge design
- Use OKLCH colors for consistent color rendering (oklch(0.72_0.19_145))
- Update tests to match new OKLCH class names

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
